name: Eldegarde
short_description: Eldegarde is a mini-MMO Action RPG with PvE, PvPvE and Arena modes. Explore vast outdoor zones, craft powerful gear, and fight to survive in a living fantasy world.
detailed_description:
Eldegarde is a third-person action PvPvE RPG featuring distinctive fantasy classes. Go on adventures solo or with friends to search for treasures, level up, and defeat any who stand in your way.



Choose between 6 iconic classic fantasy classes to level up: the Warrior, Rogue, Hunter, Priest, Wizard and Paladin, each with their own character model, armor, weapons and skills.

Explore 5 unique zones with up to 32 different creature encounters. Embark solo or with up to 2 others in either PvE Expeditions, PvPvE Extraction or fast-paced Arenas.


Bring your best gear and potions into every adventure, but beware. Death comes at a cost, and in PvPvE, others can claim what’s yours.

When you can't find the loot you want, craft it with Eldegarde's rich crafting and progression system. 

Earn reputation with the vendors in Stonehaven to unlock new crafting recipes. Build your Lodge and unlock furnishings like the Forge to process Ore, the Bed to earn Rested Experience, or the Critter Habitat where you house Goldgrubs to spin golden thread for passive income!

KEY FEATURES

  • Level up six unique classes, each with powerful abilities, weapons, and gear sets with powerful and unique perks.

  • Play solo or with up to two friends in cooperative party-based adventures.

  • Explore and conquer five distinct maps, each filled with challenges, treasures, and secrets to uncover.

  • Embark on PvE Expeditions beginning at Goldbrook Farmstead, where you’ll hunt down Mor’thog the Cruel, a menace threatening the people of Eldegarde.

  • Brave the PvPvE Extraction Mode, where greater rewards come with greater risks—if you fall, your loot is lost to those who survive.

  • Enter the Arena for fast-paced, skill-based PvP combat - no gear loss, just pride on the line.

  • Build reputation with five key vendors in Stonehaven, unlocking exclusive gear, crafting recipes, and rare materials.

  • Expand and furnish your personal lodge with functional buildings such as the Forge, Loom, Tanner, Critter Habitat, and Transmutation Device to enhance your crafting and progression.

  • Complete 17 Campaign questlines that uncover the lore of Eldegarde and reward you with powerful treasures.

  • Take on over 110 rotating quests from the Quest Board, refreshed daily and weekly for endless challenges and rewards.

  • Experience seasonal resets that wipe progression and usher in new content, updates, and world-changing events—everyone starts fresh, every season.

A LIVING WORLD

Eldegarde has tons of content planned for the futures. Some highlights of content to look out for in the future are:

  • New Class: Witch

  • New Epic Zone: Karth

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French
*languages with full audio support
